name: Large Scale — 35+ Message Clinical Data Exchange Sequence Diagram
input: Create a sequence diagram for a clinical trial data exchange between 6 actors: Principal Investigator (PI), Clinical Research Coordinator (CRC), Electronic Data Capture (EDC) system, Central Lab, Data Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB), and Sponsor. Flow: PI enrolls patient, CRC enters demographics into EDC, EDC validates and sends confirmation. CRC orders labs, Central Lab processes samples, returns results to EDC. PI reviews lab results, enters adverse events if any. Use a par block for parallel: CRC enters vitals AND PI enters clinical assessments simultaneously. Use an alt block: if SAE detected, PI notifies Sponsor immediately, Sponsor notifies DSMB, DSMB reviews and responds with continue/hold/terminate; else routine data entry continues. EDC generates query for missing data, CRC resolves query. Sponsor runs interim analysis, shares blinded report with DSMB. DSMB sends recommendation to Sponsor. At least 20 distinct messages between participants.
qualityCriteria: Diagram type is sequence with at least 6 participants
PI, CRC, EDC, Central Lab, DSMB, and Sponsor as participants
Patient enrollment and demographics entry messages
Lab order and results exchange between CRC, Central Lab, EDC
Adverse event reporting message from PI
Parallel block (par) for simultaneous vitals and assessments
Alt block for SAE vs routine path
SAE notification chain: PI to Sponsor to DSMB
At least 20 distinct messages between participants
